dates.description: Start our journey with the perfect cup of coffee and endless conversations.
dates.dressCode: Casual chic — your cutest café outfit
dates.loveNote: You make every morning brighter than the Brazilian sun.

dates.description: Cook pasta together or find the best Italian place in town.
dates.dressCode: Italian elegance — dress like you're in Rome
dates.loveNote: Like pasta and sauce, we're better together.

dates.description: Indulge in French pastries and sweet moments together.
dates.dressCode: Parisian chic — stripes or floral
dates.loveNote: Every moment with you is sweeter than a Parisian macaron.

dates.description: Win prizes at the arcade and sip bubble tea under neon lights.
dates.dressCode: Kawaii casual — be your cutest self
dates.loveNote: With you, every moment feels like a Tokyo adventure.

dates.description: Fill a photo strip with our silliest and sweetest moments.
dates.dressCode: Seoul street style — effortlessly cute
dates.loveNote: Every photo with you is my favourite picture.

dates.description: Relax and unwind together — a full pampering day.
dates.dressCode: Comfortable and cozy — spa vibes only
dates.loveNote: You deserve to be pampered every single day.

dates.description: Fiesta night with amazing food and colourful cocktails.
dates.dressCode: Colourful and festive — bring the fiesta vibes
dates.loveNote: Life with you is the best fiesta.

dates.description: Dance together under warm Spanish lights.
dates.dressCode: Red and passionate — dress for the dance
dates.loveNote: My heart dances every time I see you.

dates.description: Walk hand in hand and watch the most beautiful sunset.
dates.dressCode: White and blue — Santorini style
dates.loveNote: Every sunset reminds me that beautiful things end and begin with you.

dates.description: Try the most amazing ice cream flavours together.
dates.dressCode: Cozy and warm — Swiss style
dates.loveNote: You're sweeter than any ice cream in Switzerland.

dates.description: Pack a basket and have the perfect outdoor picnic.
dates.dressCode: Floral and fresh — picnic perfect
dates.loveNote: I could spend every afternoon with you in the sunshine.

dates.description: Street food adventure followed by a cozy movie night.
dates.dressCode: Colourful kurta or comfy movie night attire
dates.loveNote: Our love story is better than any Bollywood film.

dates.description: Spend hours in a bookstore choosing books for each other.
dates.dressCode: Literary chic — bring your reading glasses
dates.loveNote: You are the best story I've ever been part of.

dates.description: Create something beautiful together with your hands.
dates.dressCode: Clothes you don't mind getting dirty — messy chic
dates.loveNote: Like clay, you've shaped my heart into something beautiful.

dates.description: Paint each other's portraits or a joint masterpiece.
dates.dressCode: Artist vibes — an oversized shirt as your smock
dates.loveNote: Life with you is my greatest masterpiece.

dates.description: Compete, laugh, and let the best golfer win (that's you).
dates.dressCode: Sporty cute — your best athletic look
dates.loveNote: Every hole-in-one with you feels like winning at life.

dates.description: Bowling shoes, strikes, and pure laughter.
dates.dressCode: Retro bowling style — socks are mandatory
dates.loveNote: You knocked me off my feet the moment I met you.

dates.description: Walk through an underwater world hand in hand.
dates.dressCode: Ocean blue — dress like the sea
dates.loveNote: In a sea full of fish, I'd choose you every time.

dates.description: Lie back and watch the stars together under the dome.
dates.dressCode: Midnight blue — dress like the night sky
dates.loveNote: Of all the stars in the universe, I'm glad I found you.

dates.description: The final chapter of our adventure — the biggest surprise yet.
dates.dressCode: Your most special outfit — you deserve it
dates.loveNote: And so our greatest adventure begins. Happy Birthday, Parchiti. ❤️
